items.name: Frontend Design
items.description: Distinctive, intentional UI design guidance — typography, palette, and anti-template aesthetics for web interfaces.

items.name: ClickUp Maintainer
items.description: Create, update, search, and manage ClickUp tasks via MCP — skill plus focused subagent for bulk triage.

items.description: Author and publish first-party ted-craft skills with manifests, validation, and docs generation.

items.name: Docs Maintainer
items.description: Keep ted-craft site docs and marketplace copy user-facing — tone, structure, and audience checks for people browsing and installing skills, not for repo maintainers.

items.name: React Performance
items.description: Measure and optimize React/Next.js apps for load time and responsiveness: bundles, re-renders, data fetching, Core Web Vitals, and perceived performance.

items.name: React Security
items.description: Harden React/Next.js apps: HttpOnly auth cookies, CSP, XSS-safe HTML, security headers, env separation, BotID, and Snyk SAST/SCA gates.

items.name: Security Review
items.description: Pre-publish checklist: secrets, personal IDs, attribution, and validate-registry gates for ted-craft artifacts.

items.name: SVG currentColor
items.description: After an agent writes an SVG, normalize hardcoded stroke and fill colors to currentColor so icons inherit theme text color.

items.name: ted-craft Root
items.description: Routing protocol for discovering and installing the smallest useful ted-craft artifact.
